completion_summary: Made committed JSON artifact hashes invariant to Git CRLF/LF transport, corrected Classic and operation-development report bindings to repository LF bytes, and added JSON-vs-binary line-ending regression coverage. Joint gate: ruff/mypy pass and 38 tests pass.
scope: Make committed JSON artifact bindings invariant to Git CRLF/LF transport normalization, repair the two stale development-report digests, and add cross-line-ending regression coverage.
